_comment: UI shell strings for the English voice (ADR-0022 Inc2). Missing keys fall back to the built-in Japanese.
boot_title: [*] Opening Chacha's engawa (garden arcs / event-source build)
boot_starting_console: [*] Starting up… (first run downloads npx)  Say hi. /help for commands
boot_auth_hint: If it's an auth error, log in with `claude` first (or start LM Studio for the openai backend).
boot_auth_hint_web: If it's an auth error, log in with `claude` first (or start LM Studio for the openai backend).
boot_ok_web: [ok] The engawa is open ({tag}) — say hi
boot_bye: [*] Closing the engawa. Chacha will mind the house.
help_talk: just type and press Enter → talk to Chacha
help_arc: /arc [雀|猫|風]  → play a garden arc now (sparrow/cat/wind)
help_codex: /codex <persona>  → invite a guest (opens a three-way chat)
help_game: /game <id> [watch] → play a game (blackjack/uno/leduc; add `watch` to spectate; needs rlcard)
help_font: /font [scale|save] → text size (e.g. /font 1.4; bare /font shows current; /font save persists)
help_daynight: /daynight [on|off|HH:MM|demo|auto] → day/night tint (on/off saves; HH:MM pins; demo fast-forwards dusk→night; auto=real time)
help_restart: /restart         → restart Chacha's session (if her output gets weird; context resets)
no_response: (No answer… it went quiet for a moment.)
room_turned: [they stop mid-sentence and turn to you]
busy_game: A game is on. After it's done, alright?
busy_guest: There's already a guest over. Hold on a bit.
visit_fail: (The guest couldn't make it. Check the codex connection / ChatGPT login.)
guest_timeout_leave: The guest remembered something urgent and hurried off.
resident_hiccup: (Chacha went quiet for a moment… give her a beat)
absence_away: (Chacha slipped away for a bit… calling her back)
absence_fail: (Couldn't bring Chacha back. Closing the engawa.)
absence_leave: Gonna step away for a bit. Back soon.
absence_return: Mm, back. Now where were we…
ui_placeholder_send: Say something… (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a newline)
ui_placeholder_newline: Say something… (newlines OK · send with Ctrl+Enter or the Send button)
